overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a dark coat and hat walking through a rainy forest at night with a lantern. The character approaches and circles a rustic log cabin before returning to the forest path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail alongside rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a forest path holding a lantern, with a large rock wall to the right and dense trees ahead

entered.detail: tall moss-covered rock formation running alongside the path
dense forest of tall pine trees creating a dark canopy
green ferns and bushes lining the dirt path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow forest path at night in heavy rain, holding a lantern that illuminates the immediate area. A large rock wall runs along the right side while dense pine trees and undergrowth fill the scene.

events.description: wooden cabin with warm light becomes visible through the trees in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the forest toward a distant light source from a cabin visible through the trees

entered.detail: rustic log cabin with warm yellow light glowing from windows
small rocky formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: As the character continues through the forest, the rock wall falls behind and a wooden cabin with warm light becomes visible in the distance. The path opens slightly as the character approaches the cabin through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic log cabin with porch and storage barrels

events.description: arrives at the wooden cabin and begins circling around the structure
character turns the corner around the cabin, revealing the side with windows

agents.ego_description: circling the cabin and examining the porch, wooden barrels, and exterior walls

entered.detail: wooden porch with roof overhang at the cabin entrance
wooden storage barrels beside the cabin door
stone chimney structure attached to the cabin
window with warm light glowing from inside the cabin
wooden crates and boxes stacked near the cabin
wooden door with lantern hanging beside it
simple wooden bench on the cabin porch
stone foundation blocks at the base of the cabin

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the log cabin and walks around it, examining the porch, barrels, and stone chimney. The warm light from the windows contrasts with the dark rainy night as the character circles the structure.

events.description: leaves the cabin behind and returns to the forest path

agents.ego_description: walking away from the cabin back into the dense forest

entered.detail: thick ferns and undergrowth beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the cabin and walks back into the forest, with the trees and undergrowth returning to dominate the view. The warm light of the cabin fades behind as the character continues through the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy nocturnal forest that leads to a warm, illuminated cabin before retreating back into the darkness. It begins with the character walking along a narrow path flanked by a large rock wall and dense pine trees, with a handheld lantern cutting through the heavy rain. As the rock wall recedes, the path opens up to reveal a rustic wooden cabin glowing in the distance. The camera then circles the structure, moving past the porch, barrels, and stone chimney where the warm window light contrasts with the surrounding storm. Finally, the character turns away from the cabin and disappears back into the forest, as the warm glow fades and the oppressive undergrowth once again dominates the view.
